tempting_claim: OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, Meta, or any named closed lab used a specific open corpus or exact source share.
blocked_until: Company-disclosed training data, paper/model card, or same-scope primary evidence.
allowed_substitute: Open corpora show public recipes and pressures; closed corpora remain mostly undisclosed.

tempting_claim: Common Crawl, C4, Pile, books, or code data are legal or illegal training sources.
blocked_until: Court rulings or legal analysis outside the scope of this corpus visual pass.
allowed_substitute: The sources raise provenance, documentation, and rights questions; the book does not adjudicate legality.

tempting_claim: An open web dataset represents the internet, the world, a language, or users neutrally.
blocked_until: Dataset audit with scope, sampling, language/domain distribution, and bias analysis.
allowed_substitute: Web-derived corpora are filtered artifacts with documented and undocumented skews.

tempting_claim: FineWeb, RefinedWeb, Dolma, RedPajama, or DataComp-LM is the best dataset.
blocked_until: Comparable benchmark protocol, model setup, data budget, evaluation suite, and date.
allowed_substitute: Each source shows one curation strategy and its stated evaluation frame.

tempting_claim: A named deployed model leaks training data at a specific rate.
blocked_until: Model-specific extraction study, sampling method, access conditions, and date.
allowed_substitute: Memorization and extraction are known risk families with conditions and measurement limits.

tempting_claim: A language or writing system is more expensive in all models because of tokenization.
blocked_until: Model-specific tokenizer, benchmark text, pricing/date, and output behavior.
allowed_substitute: Tokenization changes length and representation; exact costs are model/date dependent.

tempting_claim: Long context solves memory, retrieval, codebase understanding, legal review, or enterprise knowledge.
blocked_until: Task evidence, model/date, context setup, retrieval protocol, latency/cost, and evaluation.
allowed_substitute: Long context increases the amount of input available at inference and creates new costs/constraints.

tempting_claim: Synthetic data is now a known share of modern frontier-model training corpora.
blocked_until: Company disclosure or reproducible corpus audit.
allowed_substitute: Synthetic data is a likely/claimed technique in some papers, but closed-corpus shares are blocked.
